title: conostegia peltata
intro: Conostegia peltata, also known as the leather-leaved conostegia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections. Conostegia peltata can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or used in tinctures and ointments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
